title: pentzia incana
intro: Pentzia incana is a perennial shrub native to southern Africa, belonging to the Asteraceae family and commonly known as the 'hairy pentzia' due to its hairy leaves. Traditionally, Pentzia incana has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and pain, and has also been used to treat respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Pentzia incana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
